incidents.summary: Dukascopy datafeed intermittent 60s read-timeouts during first bulk fetch; run exceeded the 10-minute session budget and was terminated (SIGTERM)
incidents.impact: 4 of 9 hour-files initially missing; no data corruption (raw-first, append-only)
incidents.resolution: re-fetch with 20s timeout x6 attempts completed all 9 files; duplicate protection verified across process restart

incidents.impact: USDJPY 12h/13h and GBPUSD backfill ingested AFTER a later hour; flags record ingestion-vs-event order honestly. Event times inside each raw blob are monotonic; replay reproduces identical content
incidents.resolution: expected behaviour for backfill; documented in README
